stemHtml: Globe Air 621 uses SELCAL code ALBM. What is the correct request for a SELCAL check?

options.a: Gander radio, Globe Air 621 request SELCAL check.
options.b: Gander radio, Globe Air 621, request to confirm the correct tone.
options.c: Globe Air 621 request SELCAL check from Gander radio, ALBM.
options.d: Globe Air 621 on 8891, request SELCAL check ALBM.
